care.summary: Epiphytic fern with broad, forked, antler-shaped fronds that grow mounted on wood or in slatted baskets.
care.light: Bright indirect light; tolerates some shade
care.water: Soak root ball weekly; mist fronds in dry air
care.soil: Sphagnum moss, bark, and orchid mix; not potted in normal soil
care.fertilizer: Dilute balanced fertilizer monthly during active growth
common_issues: Brown shield fronds are normal; do not remove them
Low humidity leads to stunted growth
tips: Mount on wood or cork bark for natural growth habit
Soak the entire mount in water weekly rather than top watering
New fronds emerge from the center and emerge fuzzy white
